mapper.select: select MENU_ID AS id ,MENU_NM AS name ,MENU_DESC AS description ,MENU_SEQ AS seq ,PARENT_MENU_ID AS parentId from TBMENUBS order by MENU_SEQ
SELECT MENU_ID AS menuId ,MENU_NM AS menuNm ,MENU_DESC AS menuDesc ,MENU_SEQ AS menuSeq ,PARENT_MENU_ID AS parentMenuId FROM TBMENUBS WHERE MENU_ID = #{menuId, jdbcType = VARCHAR}
SELECT MENU_ID AS menuId ,MENU_NM AS menuNm ,MENU_DESC AS menuDesc ,MENU_SEQ AS menuSeq ,PARENT_MENU_ID AS parentMenuId FROM TBMENUBS WHERE PARENT_MENU_ID = #{menuId, jdbcType = VARCHAR}
mapper.update: UPDATE TBMENUBS SET MENU_NM = #{menuNm, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, MENU_DESC = #{menuDesc, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, MENU_SEQ = #{menuSeq, jdbcType = NUMERIC}, PARENT_MENU_ID = #{parentMenuId, jdbcType = VARCHAR} WHERE MENU_ID = #{menuId, jdbcType = VARCHAR}
DELETE TBMENUBS WHERE MENU_ID = #{menuId, jdbcType = VARCHAR}
mapper.select: SELECT A.MENU_ID as id ,A.MENU_NM as name ,A.MENU_SEQ as seq ,A.MENU_DESC as description ,A.PARENT_MENU_ID as parentId ,B.PERM_ID AS permId FROM TBMENUBS AS A, TBROLEMENURL AS B WHERE A.MENU_ID = B.MENU_ID AND B.ROLE_ID = #{roleId, jdbcType = VARCHAR} order by A.MENU_SEQ
